user.title: Add LIXIL Shutter
user.description: Select a nearby LIXIL shutter or enter its BLE address.

confirm.title: Confirm device
confirm.description:
Found **{name}** ({address}) — product type: {product_type}.

Continue to start pairing?

pair.title: Pair shutter
pair.description: Put the shutter into **pairing mode** by holding the pairing button on the remote for 5–10 seconds until the LED flashes, then press **Submit**.

error.device_not_found: Shutter not found — make sure it is powered on and in range.
error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Check that the shutter is in pairing mode and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.
